originalTitle: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
content: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

title: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war

originalTitle: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
title: Amazing Robots Helping Out Far Away!
content:
Hello, My Wonderful Friends in Africa!

Hello, hello, hello! It's your kid-friendly news reporter here, bringing you exciting stories from around our amazing world. I hope you're all having a fantastic day! Today, we're going to talk about something super cool: robots! You know, those clever machines that can do all sorts of jobs. We usually see them in cartoons or sometimes even helping at home, but guess what? They are now doing very important work in a place far, far away.

What Are Robots?

First, let's remember what robots are. Robots are special machines built by people. They have computers inside their 'brains' that tell them what to do. Some robots can move their arms, some can roll on wheels, and some can even fly! They are made to help us with jobs that might be too hard, too boring, or even too dangerous for people to do. Did you know? The word 'robot' comes from an old play where machines did all the hard work! People didn't use this word until about 100 years ago.

Robots Helping in a Difficult Place

Now, let's talk about a country very far from Africa, called Ukraine. In Ukraine, people are having a very difficult time, like when friends have a big disagreement that needs sorting out. Because it's a difficult and sometimes unsafe place, people are looking for new ways to help keep everyone safe and look after things. That's where our clever robots come in! The people in Ukraine are starting a special plan to use robots to help in these difficult areas. It's like asking a super-smart, brave helper to go where it's not safe for people.

What Do These Special Robots Do?

These robots are not like your toy robots at home. They are built to be very strong and smart. They have special tools and cameras. Imagine a robot that can go into a place where it's not safe for a person, look around with its camera eyes, and send pictures back to people. This helps people know what's happening without putting themselves in danger. Some of these robots also carry special things to help protect areas. Think of them as super-strong, mechanical helpers that can defend a place or carry important equipment. They are designed to assist in keeping people and places safe during these tricky times. Did you know? Some robots can even detect tiny changes in the ground or air, which is super helpful for finding out if an area is safe or not!

Why Use Robots?

That's a great question! Why robots? Well, robots have many super powers! 1. **They Don't Get Tired**: Robots can work for a very long time without needing a rest or a snack. 2. **They Can Go Anywhere**: Some robots can go into places that are too small, too hot, too cold, or too dangerous for people. Maybe there's a lot of smoke, or tiny broken pieces on the ground – the robots can go first. 3. **They Are Very Strong**: Robots can carry heavy things that people can't easily lift. 4. **They Can See Everything**: With their special cameras and sensors, they can see things that might be hidden or far away. Using robots means fewer people have to be in dangerous spots. This keeps many brave men and women out of harm's way, which is a very important job for robots to do.

Different Kinds of Robots Helping Out

There are many different types of robots that can help in these special situations. Some robots have wheels, like a mini-car, and roll along the ground. They are good for moving across different surfaces. Other robots have special tracks, like a tiny tank, which helps them climb over rocks and rough ground. And guess what? There are even flying robots, called drones, that can fly high in the sky to get a bird's-eye view of everything below. They are like tiny flying eyes that help people see things from above! Did you know? Some robots are even designed to look like animals, making them very good at moving through forests or bumpy areas!

Robots and Safety Rules

Using robots for important jobs like this comes with big rules. People always control the robots from a safe place. They don't just let the robots wander off! They tell the robots exactly what to do and where to go. It's like playing a video game, but with real robots doing real jobs. It's very important that robots are used carefully and only for good reasons, like helping to keep people safe and finding out important information. Everyone wants to make sure these clever machines are always doing the right thing.

The Future of Robots

Isn't it amazing how much robots can do? From cleaning our floors to exploring space, and now helping in difficult places far away. As technology gets even smarter, robots will probably do even more incredible things! Maybe one day, they will help us plant more trees, or even explore deep under the ocean to discover new creatures. It reminds us that science and technology are always growing, and there are so many ways they can help our world become a better, safer place for everyone. Even though this news is from far away, it shows us how smart inventions can make a difference.

Goodbye for Now, My Friends!

That's all for today's exciting robot news! I hope you learned something new and interesting about these amazing machines. Keep being curious and keep exploring the wonderful world around you. See you next time for more awesome news from Africa and beyond! Bye-bye for now!
summary: Robots are being used in a country called Ukraine to help people in difficult and sometimes unsafe areas by providing protection, scouting, and carrying important items.
whyMatters: This is important because using robots means fewer people have to go into dangerous places, which helps to keep many brave men and women safe while still getting important jobs done.

content: Wrexham's first taste of VAR left them thinking about what might have been as they lost 4-2 in an FA Cup thriller.

content: With Arsenal and Manchester City still in the running for four trophies, BBC Sport looks at who else has come close to doing the Quadruple.

originalTitle: Chelsea overcome Wrexham in extra-time FA Cup thriller
title: Chelsea overcome Wrexham in extra-time FA Cup thriller
content: Chelsea come from behind twice to scupper 10-man Wrexham's hopes of a giant-killing in a thrilling FA Cup fifth-round tie.
